zh.lifeSummary: 當Baudouin de Lannoy於1240年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德利勒-藍諾易時，他的父親Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys29歲，母親Marota de Balleuil18歲。他於1268年與Amicie de Wavrin結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1310年在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德蘭諾伊享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lannoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: altered form of Flemish Van Oye or Van Hoye (or perhaps an Americanized form of any of their French variants, such as Vanoye, Vannoye, and Vanhoye), a habitational name for someone from a place called with Middle Dutch oye ‘(water) meadow’, as for example Hoye, near Ghent, Belgium. This form of the surname has apparently died out in France. Compare Van Hoy and Vanoy .

History: According to the family tradition, the ancestors of Vannoy family were Huguenots from France who first settled in the Netherlands and later moved to North America. However, their surname is not listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors, nor in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Vanoy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Ancil, Cecile.
American or French: variant of   Vannoy  , a surname of Flemish origin. This surname is virtually non-existing in France.

variants.name: Van Hoy
meanings: American or French (also Vanhoy): variant of Vannoy , a surname of Flemish origin. This surname is very rare in France (Nord).

nameMeanings.name: Baudouin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Baudouin de Lannoy was born in 1240, in Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys, was 29 and his mother, Marota de Balleuil, was 18. He married Amicie de Wavrin in 1268. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1310, in Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baudouin de Lannoy est né en 1240, à Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Marota de Balleuil, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Amicie de Wavrin en 1268. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1310, à Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baudouin de Lannoy 1240 in Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys 29 und seine Mutter Marota de Balleuil 18. Er hat 1268 Amicie de Wavrin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1310 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin de Lannoy è nato il nel 1240 nel Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Marota de Balleuil, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Amicie de Wavrin nel 1268. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1310, nel Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baudouin de Lannoyが1240年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードリス-レズ-ラノイで生まれた時，父Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lysは29歳，母Marota de Balleuilは18歳であった。1268年にAmicie de Wavrinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1310年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードラノイで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baudouin de Lannoy(이)가 1240년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 리스-레즈-랜이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Marota de Balleuil(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1268년 Amicie de Wavrin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1310년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 랜이에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin de Lannoy nasceu em 1240, em Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Marota de Balleuil, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Amicie de Wavrin em 1268. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1310, em Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baudouin de Lannoy родился в 1240 г. в местности лис-лез-ланнои, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Marota de Balleuil, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Amicie de Wavrin в 1268 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1310 г. в местности ланнои, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baudouin de Lannoy nació en 1240, en Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Marota de Balleuil, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Amicie de Wavrin en 1268. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1310, en Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 70 años.
